label: content
narrative: Section 11-05 '入力と出力' covers printer types (6-row table), six printer term entries (inkjet/impact/thermal-transfer/thermal/laser/3D), dpi/ppm/resolution terms, and a dpi-concept figure. All jp content faithful to OCR. zh translations use Chinese terminology consistently (喷墨/击打式/热转印/热敏/激光/3D打印机). en preserves dpi expansion 'Dot Per Inch' and ppm 'Pages Per Minute'. Glossary entries distinct; table cells and term definitions stay consistent.
